title: Light Blue Balloons, 100 Pcs 10 Inch Light Blue Balloons Thick Latex Balloon for Wedding Engagement Baby Shower Bridal Birthday Anniversary Party Decorations Supplies
features: Package Includes: You'll get 100 pieces 10 inch Blue balloons, which are enough to decorate your party to keep it interesting, the 10-inch size and dazzling sang Blue color will make your party very attractive, a great way to decorate a birthday or other party.

Blue Latex Balloons: Our Blue party balloons are made of natural latex, harmless and non-toxic. Helium filled balloons float in the air to add flexibility to your party. Blue latex balloons hold their shape for two days when filled with air and 6-8 hours when filled with helium.

Suitable for any occasion: These Blue balloons is a very classic and gentle colour. These party balloons are suitable for events such as baby shower, birthday parties, weddings, anniversaries or other celebrations. Retro Sage green balloon decorations in different sizes ensure that your party stands out.

Blue Balloon Arch: This Blue balloon kit party balloon that makes it easier for you to create a beautiful gentle olive green balloon arch garland kit! All you need to do is blow the balloons into the air with air or helium and use the tool to put them together. You will really enjoy this simple, fast and fun activity!

Safety Warning: This is a decorative product only, not a toy. Balloons may pose a choking hazard. Adult assembly and supervision are required at all times. Keep uninflated or broken balloons away from children.
